items.title: Freshworks expects strong fourth-quarter revenue on AI-driven software demand
items.description: Freshworks forecast fourth-quarter revenue above Wall Street estimates on Wednesday, ​betting on growing demand for its artificial intelligence-powered software ‌tools. The company expects fourth-quarter revenue of $217 million to $220 million, a midpoint ‌that is above analysts' average estimate of $216.5 million, according to LSEG data. Businesses are increasingly adopting AI-driven solutions to manage their IT services and automate certain business operations as they look to ⁠cut costs and drive ‌efficiency.

items.title: Performance Food Group Co (PFGC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Growth Amid ...
items.description: Performance Food Group Co (PFGC) reports robust top-line growth and raises full-year sales guidance despite facing higher operating expenses and inventory investments.

items.title: Salesforce Rival Sierra Hosts Customer Conference Amid AI Agent Battle
items.description: Third quarter earnings for Salesforce stock are due Dec. 3. Rival Sierra hosts its first developer conference on Wednesday amid a battle in artificial intelligence software.
